title: [CI:DOCS] Update release notes for Podman v4.0.0
body:
As the title says.

Our largest release so far by a significant margin, in terms of release notes (I think 2.0 probably has us beat in terms of diffstat, but I haven't verified that).

comments.body:
For the curious:

v3.4.4 to v4.0.0 is:
 1142 files changed, 27628 insertions(+), 21416 deletions(-)
v2.2.1 to v3.0.0 is:
 703 files changed, 30388 insertions(+), 21267 deletions(-)
v1.9.3 to v2.0.0 is: 
 880 files changed, 34425 insertions(+), 36600 deletions(-)

All figures exclude changes to `vendor/` (which isn't strictly fair here, because a lot of Paul's work landed in c/common, but thinking of a regex to allow vendor/github.com/containers and nothing else is complicated and my brain is fried.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mheon,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
